name: glusterfs
explanation: The GlusterFS check shells out to the local `gstatus` binary (shipped with the Agent at `<run_path>/embedded/sbin/gstatus`) via `subprocess.run`, parses the JSON output, and emits cluster/volume/brick metrics. There is no remote host or port — discovery means "is gstatus installed and runnable on this host, and is glusterd present?". A passwordless sudoers entry for `dd-agent` is also required. This matches Pattern L (local CLI subprocess), analogous to varnish/ceph/postfix.
notes: Pattern L. No network probe; auto-config would need to detect the gstatus binary on the host filesystem.
